title: evolvulus helianthemoides var. lanatus
intro: Evolvulus helianthemoides var. lanatus, also known as the hairy dwarf morning glory, is a plant species within the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Evolvulus helianthemoides var. lanatus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
